LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING COMMISSION, KELLY AMDUR, AND REAL PARTY IN INTEREST 270 VALENCIA STREET LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO OTHER APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS CONCEDE IN THE PETITION THAT THEY HAVE NOT EXHAUSTED THEIR ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES. THE PETITION ON ITS FACE FAILS TO STATE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO SHOW THAT PURSUING SUCH ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES WOULD BE FUTILE. THERE IS NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT PLAINTIFF CAN AMEND TO CORRECT THE DEFICIENCY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/LMG) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING COMMISSION, KELLY AMDUR, AND REAL PARTY IN INTEREST 270 VALENCIA STREET LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Matthew S. Kenefick of Jeffer Mangels Butler & Mitchell LLP (984.9677) for moving party 270 Valencia Street LLC. No other appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiffs concede in the petition that they have not exhausted their administrative remedies. The petition on its face fails to state facts sufficient to show that pursuing such administrative remedies would be futile. There is no reasonable probability that plaintiff can amend to correct the deficiency. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Continued To Mar-30-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: 270 VALENCIA STREET LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to March 30, 2011 on the court's own motion. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
